1.seasonStats: Key player for Burkina Faso U17 at 2025 FIFA U17 World Cup
1.clubStanding: New Stars FC — Burkinabè academy known for producing Arsène Kouassi (Lorient), Alio Souleymane (Nordsjælland)
1.notes: Imposing 1.93m frame with defensive maturity beyond his age. One of the standout defenders at the U17 World Cup in Qatar. Profile validated by multiple European scouts.

2.seasonStats: Played at youth level in Senegalese system before Milan move
2.clubStanding: Signed to Milan Futuro (Serie D pathway). Fee: €750k + bonuses (up to €2m total)
2.notes: Strong centre-back prospect. Attracted interest from Burnley, Ipswich, Barcelona, RB Leipzig, Lyon and Eintracht Frankfurt before Milan sealed the deal. Captain of Senegal U17 at the World Cup. Confirmed by Fabrizio Romano.

3.notes: Forward on our watchlist. Limited public intel available — scouting network sourced.

4.seasonStats: Featured at 2025 FIFA U17 World Cup for Ivory Coast
4.clubStanding: San Pedro FC — Ivorian Ligue 1 club
4.notes: Explosive, direct winger who attacks his marker with both feet. Brother of Gervinho (ex-Arsenal, Roma). Modern winger profile — can cut inside, cross, and shoot from either side.

5.contract: Pre-contract with Hammarby (partnership deal with Réal du Faso)
5.seasonStats: U17 AFCON 2025 joint top scorer — 7 GOALS (hat-trick vs Zambia QF 6-1, brace vs Cameroon 2-1). MOTM twice (vs Egypt & Cameroon). 62.5% shooting accuracy — best in tournament. Also starred at U17 World Cup in Qatar (youngest player)
5.clubStanding: Réal du Faso — top Burkinabè academy. Cannot move to Europe until March 2028 (turns 18)
5.notes: Likened to Didier Drogba. Generational talent with 10+ elite clubs tracking. Chelsea leading charge over Man United. Hammarby hold a pre-contract + partnership with Réal du Faso. RS Berkane (Morocco) also interested. U17 AFCON 2025 top scorer — stock exploding. CAF: 'Every movement is a demonstration of technical mastery.' Long-term deal — earliest move 2027/2028.

6.notes: Young prospect (b.2010) on watchlist. Limited public intel — scouting network sourced.

7.clubStanding: San Pedro FC — same club as Yao Hubert
7.notes: Midfielder on watchlist. Limited public intel available.

8.notes: Defender on watchlist. Limited public intel available.

9.contract: Expected first professional deal with Randers FC
9.seasonStats: U17 AFCON 2025 — scored in semi-final vs Burkina Faso (header, 74th min, 2-0 win). Mali reached final. Also starred at U17 World Cup in Qatar
9.clubStanding: Players Dreams — rising Malian academy. Frankfurt move pending visa resolution
9.notes: Versatile midfielder known for above-average football intelligence. Frankfurt deal agreed (~3yr) but visa delays persist — still in Africa (playing U17 AFCON confirms this). Villarreal, Monaco, Randers also interested.

10.previousClub: Amitié FC (Thiès, Senegal) — club president: Demba Ba
10.seasonStats: U21 DEBUT made Mar 17 vs Man City U21s (27 mins sub, 2-0 loss). 4 starts at U17 World Cup. Senegal reached R32
10.clubStanding: Liverpool FC U21s under Rob Page. Fee ~£1m + add-ons
10.notes: Left-footed CB, 188cm. Compared to Kalidou Koulibaly. Rob Page: 'absolute class'. Didn't concede while on pitch on debut. Composed on ball, impressive forward passing. Expected to feature regularly now. Talk of first-team pre-season tour to USA.

11.notes: Forward on watchlist. Limited public intel available.

12.seasonStats: 4 matches at U17 World Cup (1 assist). Also played U17 AFCON 2025 (Senegal reached QF). Rated top 3 Senegal U17 prospect by AfricaFoot
12.clubStanding: Diambars FC — elite Senegalese academy (also produced Sidy Barhama Ndiaye → Liverpool)
12.notes: Extraordinarily effective dribbler. BACK on Man Utd trial (Mar 2026, post-AFCON). First trial Sep 2025. Galatasaray also tracking (Nov 2025). Eligible summer 2026. IMPORTANT: 'Victor Étienne Mendy' → Fenerbahçe is a DIFFERENT player (from AS Bambey).

13.previousClub: Ugandan youth system → Aarhus GF (free transfer)
13.seasonStats: AGF U19 Boys League. 14 goals in 15 U17 caps. Scored Uganda's first-ever U17 World Cup goal (vs Canada). Winner vs France (1-0)
13.clubStanding: Aarhus GF — Danish Superliga leaders. Transfer officially registered Feb 2, 2026
13.notes: SENIOR AFCON 2025 HISTORY MAKER — 2nd youngest EVER at AFCON (17y 10m). Made 2+ sub appearances (vs Tunisia & Tanzania). Coach Put: 'great talent with huge potential.' Youngest Ugandan at AFCON since 1974. Hat-trick on AGF debut. Injury setback in Feb but recovered.

14.notes: Midfielder on watchlist. Limited public intel available.

15.notes: Defensive midfielder on watchlist. Limited public intel available.

16.clubStanding: Réal du Faso — same academy as Tapsoba
16.notes: Goalkeeper on watchlist. Teammate of Asharaf Loukmane Tapsoba at Réal du Faso.

17.clubStanding: Génération Foot — one of Senegal's most renowned academies (produced Sadio Mané, Ismaïla Sarr)
17.notes: Goalkeeper on watchlist. Génération Foot pedigree is a strong indicator — the academy has an elite European pipeline.

18.clubStanding: Petro Luanda — one of Angola's biggest clubs
18.notes: Forward on watchlist. Playing at a top-tier Angolan club — good platform for visibility.

19.seasonStats: 2024/25: 20 apps, 1 goal, 0 assists, 1 yellow. 1,133 mins played. 2025/26: Still in squad but involvement unclear
19.clubStanding: Rahimo FC — FasoFoot Ligue 1, 2nd-5th in table. Not called up to Burkina Faso U17 squad
19.notes: CB #5 at Rahimo. Was a regular starter last season. Not selected for BFA U17 World Cup or U17 AFCON squads. No transfer interest. Quiet profile.

20.seasonStats: 2025/26: Scored vs AJEL Rufisque (17th min, Nov 2025). Named MOTM at least once. #7 shirt
20.clubStanding: Casa Sports — Senegalese Ligue 1, 3rd in table. Transfermarkt value €75K
20.notes: RW who can play LW/CF. DOB: Sep 18, 2007. Dubbed 'La nouvelle étoile du Sud' by club. Contract expiring June 2026 — could be available cheap/free. No transfer rumours yet.

21.previousClub: Wally Daan FC (Thiès) — joined AJEL on free transfer Sep 2025
21.seasonStats: 9 goals, 2 assists in 19 apps — TOP SCORER in Senegalese Ligue 1 2025/26. AJEL top of league
21.clubStanding: AJEL Rufisque — 1st place in Senegalese Ligue 1. Transfermarkt value €250K
21.notes: Known as 'Jude'. DOB: 10 Jan 2009. WATFORD BID €500K (Mar 2026) — club official flew to Senegal. Leading race ahead of Marseille, Fenerbahçe & ES Sétif. Represented by Asfan Sports Management (UK). Can't move to England until Jan 2027 (turns 18). Aims to beat Niane's 19-goal season record.
